title: acssuite accepts relative evolveDir/root — a run with cwd=<worktree>/go littered go/.evolve/runs/cycle-104/ inside the 949 worktree; abs-resolve inputs
why: Found .evolve/worktrees/cycle-21f9f7ae-949/go/.evolve/runs/cycle-104/acs-verdict.json (mtime Jul 20 00:36, TestC104_* advisory predicates, all PASS) — an acssuite invocation resolved '.evolve' relative to a go/ cwd and wrote a nested phantom tree. Harmless this time, but a relative resolution in the WRITE path means a future gate could also READ from the wrong root, recreating the 949 missing-file class from the other side.
how_to_apply: In acssuite.Run/WriteVerdict (and cmd_acs.go arg handling): filepath.Abs + require the evolveDir to end in /.evolve (or resolve via core.ResolveCycleStatePath SSOT); reject/WARN on relative inputs. Add a regression test. Sweep + delete existing go/.evolve litter in worktrees.
